reasoning: The prompt asks for the probability that the daily average temperature at Limoges-Bellegarde on a specific resolution date (implied to be the close date, 2026-02-07, as no list is provided) will be higher than on 2025-11-09. Climatologically, early November is warmer than early February in Limoges. The mean daily temperature around November 9 is roughly 8.5°C, while around February 7 it is roughly 5.0°C. With a daily standard deviation of about 3.5°C to 4.5°C for each month, the standard deviation of the difference between the two independent days is roughly 5.5°C to 6.0°C. The difference in means is about -3.5°C (Feb minus Nov). Assuming a normal distribution for the difference, the normal CDF at z = -3.5 / 5.8 is approximately 0.27, representing a roughly 27% chance that the temperature on February 7 will exceed that on November 9.
